Northeast Vietnam has cool cold season (courtesy the northeast monsoon from November March) and warm hot wet season (from April October). December and January particular can get quite frosty the far north Vietnam pack accordingly. This time the year can also see heavy mists that can run for days these can reduce visibility places like Sapa and Long Bay frustratingly short distances. The wettest months the year Hanoi are July and August, the driest, December and January.

The Food Safety and Inspection Service (FSIS) delaying the effective date the final regulations that require nutrition labelling the major cuts raw meat and poultry products and ground chopped meat and poultry products.
The original effective date for these regulations was January 2012, but the new effective date the final rule March 2012.
FSIS taking this action response request from eight trade associations, including AMI. The associations requested that FSIS exercise enforcement discretion for six month period following the January 2012, effective date the final rule. FSIS, however, concluded that two month delay the effective date will allow industry sufficient time comply with the requirements the final rule. FSIS also making correction the final rule clarify amendatory instruction.
